posts.author: TheGrestige (Grégory Onclin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone !

I’m all new on this wonderfull tool that is Monday.com.

I would like to create an automation but I’m blocked doing it.

Here’s the case:
I have a column “Start date” and an other “Due date”. I’d like to have a column “Timeline”, which will be automated if “Start date” is a start date is enter. And same for due date. Is this possible ?

Thank’s in advance !

Greg

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @TheGrestige

Welcome to the community! If I understand correctly you want a timeline that shows a timeline based on 2 columns (start and due date). That can’t be done with an automation but the good news is that this app https://monday.com/marketplace/18 does that for you.

posts.author: TheGrestige (Grégory Onclin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bas.

That’s what I was looking for !

Thanks a lot !

Greg
